narrative.description: Street Fighter IV is a competitive fighting game built on footsies, combos, frame traps, and super meter management.
narrative.core_loop: Win rounds by reading opponents, executing combos and special moves, and spending meter on supers or EX moves.

mechanics.map_notes: In Street Fighter IV, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.
mechanics.expression: In Street Fighter IV, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.

mechanics.map_notes: In Street Fighter IV, attacks can be linked in sequence or canceled into one another within timing windows to deal extended damage.
mechanics.expression: In Street Fighter IV, attacks can be linked in sequence or canceled into one another within timing windows to deal extended damage.

mechanics.map_notes: In Street Fighter IV, specific directional button sequences executed within a time window trigger character-specific special attacks.
mechanics.expression: In Street Fighter IV, specific directional button sequences executed within a time window trigger character-specific special attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: In Street Fighter IV, attacks have startup, active, and recovery frames; unsafe moves can be punished with faster counter attacks during recovery windows.
mechanics.expression: In Street Fighter IV, attacks have startup, active, and recovery frames; unsafe moves can be punished with faster counter attacks during recovery windows.

mechanics.map_notes: In Street Fighter IV, a meter fills through successful offense or defense and unlocks powerful super or ultimate attacks when full.
mechanics.expression: In Street Fighter IV, a meter fills through successful offense or defense and unlocks powerful super or ultimate attacks when full.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Street Fighter IV through its core fighting loop.
